prompt: Semantic caching layer for LLM apps handling customer prompts.
ceiling_note: regulated has a WIDE ceiling — enterprise patterns (vector store, per-tenant KMS) are allowed, but each STILL requires a complexity_justification citing a Brief/compliance constraint. banned_ceiling_terms is therefore empty; the check is instead 'every complexity_justification cites a Brief id'.

should_include_any.about: semantic cache adds an embedding+vector hop; latency claim

notes: Security must produce >=1 concrete threat the Brief ignored. Consensus batches the security + engineer high challenges into ONE escalation. Simplifier flags any complexity_justification not grounded in a Brief constraint.
